terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.reviewNotice: These terms are pending legal review before public launch.
terms.placeholder: Full terms of service will be published before public launch. These terms govern your use of NutriApp, including account creation, subscription billing, acceptable use, and data handling. Please check back before the public release.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.reviewNotice: This policy is pending legal review before public launch.
privacy.dataStorage: Your data is stored in the EU (Frankfurt region).
privacy.dataExport: You can export or delete all your data at any time from account settings.
privacy.noSell: We never sell your personal data.
privacy.placeholder: Full privacy policy will be published before public launch. This policy describes how NutriApp collects, uses, and protects your personal data in accordance with GDPR.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a copy of all your food log entries, AI tips, and account data as a JSON file.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Permanently deletes your account and all associated data. Billing records are anonymised and retained for 7 years as required by Dutch tax law. This cannot be undone.
delete.areYouSure: Are you sure? This cannot be undone.
delete.warningFoodLog: All your food log entries will be permanently deleted.
delete.warningTips: All your AI tips will be permanently deleted.

hero.title: Nutrition tracking that works your way

flexible.title: Flexible logging
flexible.description: Type 'eggs and toast' or scan a barcode. More detail means better feedback — but loose entries still count.

ai.title: AI-powered tips
ai.description: Get practical nutrition insights based on your actual eating patterns, not generic advice.

suggestions.aiTips: When do I get AI tips?

step1.title: Log your meals
step1.description: Type what you ate in plain language — 'had pasta for lunch' works fine. The AI fills in the nutrition details.

step2.title: Scan barcodes
step2.description: For packaged food, tap the barcode button and point your camera. We look it up in a database of 3 million+ products.

step3.title: Get AI tips
step3.description: After your first meal log, the AI can give you a personalised tip. The more you log, the better the insights.

step4.title: Track over time
step4.description: Use the date picker to review past days. The more you log, the better the insights.
